## items (5 lines)

pub mod zenutils_fuzz
pub struct RegressionSuite
pub fn RegressionSuite::new<P: core::convert::Into<std::path::PathBuf>>(P) -> Self

pub fn RegressionSuite::target<F>(self, &str, F) -> Self where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&[u8]) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
